untranslatable_reason: The signal references a proprietary '30% DRF Smoothing' indicator that is not available in the allowed indicator list. DRF (Demand Reversion Factor) is a custom indicator not in the standard set. The exact thresholds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are also unspecified. MACD_hist was used as a proxy for a smoothed momentum signal, but this is a best-guess approximation. The original signal cannot be accurately reconstructed without the actual DRF calculation formula and precise threshold values.
translation_notes: Signal requires proprietary DRF (Demand Reversion Factor) indicator with 30% smoothing and lagged values. Substituted macd_hist as a smoothed oscillator proxy with arbitrary thresholds (0.70 for buy/sell entry crossover, 0.80 for exit). Original thresholds marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source. Recommend: (1) obtain DRF calculation methodology, (2) clarify exact threshold values, (3) implement custom DRF indicator if backtesting framework supports custom indicators.
